patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
index 6293cbd..41f79f5 100644
--- a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
+++ b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ class _WorkItem:
             self.future.set_result(result)
 
 
-class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
+class CurrentThreadExecutor:
     """
     An Executor that actually runs code in the thread it is instantiated in.
     Passed to other threads running async code, so they can run sync code in
@@ -120,4 +120,4 @@ class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
             executor = executor._old_executor
 
         # Return the future
-        return f
+        return f
\ No newline at end of file
